title: Dreamless Spells
description: Tons of stuff to help melee and ranged fight against mages. Will makes them extremely viable even with no mana usage.
body:
**DO NOT ASK FOR A PORT TO ANY VERSION BELOW 1.21.1. IM VERY LAZY AND DO NOT WANT TO DO IT. PLEASE RERAIN FROM DOING SO FOR MY SANITY, THANKS.**

An addition to the extremely popular mod "Iron's Spells and Spellbooks" that adds in a large amount of curios, armors, weapons, and more, all for those who don't want to dive too deep into the mod or want to fight against magic users using non-magical means!

Will also will add a new school, the Empty school, specifically made to play into the anti-mage playstyle! Pelt any mage with short lasting debuff spells (which can only be casted if you have to set effect from the school's armors), and then go in for the kill with your sword! Or bow if that's what you prefer...

This mod also will add in stuff for the mages too! In exchange for less mage-relater attributes, you can obtain buffs for swords and bows! This means there will be not one, but TWO new sets per school!

THIS MOD REQUIRES THE FOLLOWING TO WORK CORRECTLY:
- Apothic Attributes
- Iron's Spells and Spellbooks and it's dependencies (duh)

[Join the Discord!](https://discord.gg/UTep7HtVGq)
